query: SELECT id, engagement_id, tool, target, finding_count, JSON_EXTRACT(severity_summary, '$.critical') as critical, JSON_EXTRACT(severity_summary, '$.high') as high, JSON_EXTRACT(severity_summary, '$.medium') as medium, JSON_EXTRACT(severity_summary, '$.low') as low, phase, created_at FROM scan_results WHERE tool = 'nuclei' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10;
